programme.title: Anti-Trust
programme.desc: In this sizzling, fast-paced thriller, computer whiz Milo Hoffman (Ryan Phillippe) lands his dream job at a major computer company, only to learn that the C.E.O. (Tim Robbins) may employ some very unorthodox -- and very deadly --business practices.

programme.title: Miami Blues
programme.desc: Fred Ward, Alec Baldwin and Jennifer Jason Leigh star in this deliciously offbeat black comedy about a murdering thief, his streetwalker-gone-straight wife and the denture-wearing cop who is closing in on his trail. Nora Dunn co-stars.

programme.title: The Bounty
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins delivers a brilliant portrayal as William Bligh, the sea captain who, in 1787, steered The Bounty on a 27,000-mile voyage into danger, chaos and madness, and whose first mate (Mel Gibson) lead a legendary mutiny against him..

programme.title: The Battle Of Britain (1969)
programme.desc: A stellar cast, including Michael Caine, Laurence Olivier and Christopher Plummer highlights this epic telling of the greatest air battle in history, when the outnumbered Royal Air Force defeated the German Luftwaffe, saving England from invasion.

programme.title: A Bridge Too Far
programme.desc: With an all-star cast that includes Sean Connery, Anthony Hopkins, Laurence Olivier, Gene Hackman and Robert Redford, this epic WW II drama recreates Operation Market Garden, an ambitious plan to hasten the end of WW II that ended in disaster.

programme.title: Hart's War
programme.desc: Bruce Willis stars as an imprisoned officer who refuses to give up his fight against the Nazis, even from behind enemy lines. With the help of a young lieutenant (Colin Farrell), he risks everything to free his men and change the outcome of the war!

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Steve McQueen, James Garner and Richard Attenborough headline a stellar cast in one of the most ingenious and suspenseful adventure films of all time as a team of Allied soldiers mount a daring escape from an "inescapable" Nazi POW camp.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1968)
programme.desc: Sophisticated, handsome Thomas Crown (Steve McQueen) is the intellect behind a bank robbery so stunning, it has Boston's finest completely baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek and smart insurance investigator out to bring him in.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair (1999)
programme.desc: In this sizzling action film, when thrill-seeking billionaire Thomas Crown (Pierce Brosnan) ingeniously steals a priceless painting from a museum, he's pitted against the beautiful insurance investigator (Rene Russo) hired to retrieve the artwork.

programme.title: The Man In The Iron Mask
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio leads a phenomenal cast in this thrilling tale of majesty and Musketeers. When the excesses of France's arrogant King Louis XIV begin to threaten his subjects' very lives, the legendary Musketeers reunite to save their country!
